recording_started_body: Speak now, then trigger again to stop.
no_speech_detected_fallback: No transcript was produced. The mic input may be muted, too quiet, near-silent, or corrupted.
delivery_pasted: Text copied and pasted into the focused app.
delivery_no_action: Text was transcribed, but no delivery action completed.
correction_fallback: Correction fell back to the raw transcript.
warning_near_silent: Captured audio was near-silent, so transcription was skipped.
warning_corrupt_audio: Captured audio looked saturated or corrupted, so transcription was skipped.
warning_empty_transcript: ASR returned empty text, so correction and output were skipped.
